observable_targets.name: CMB_TT_TE_EE
observable_targets.required_output: predicted angular power spectra and covariance-compatible residual vector

observable_targets.name: CMB_LENSING
observable_targets.required_output: predicted lensing bandpowers and residual vector

observable_targets.name: BAO_DISTANCES
observable_targets.required_output: predicted DM_over_rd, DH_over_rd, DV_over_rd by redshift bin

observable_targets.name: WEAK_LENSING_AND_CLUSTERING
observable_targets.required_output: predicted xi_plus, xi_minus, w_theta, gamma_t, nuisance-aware residual vector

admissibility_rule: A DFM-vs-Lambda-CDM comparison is inadmissible until all required missing objects are supplied before likelihood execution.
boundary: Does not supply DFM action functional.
Does not supply DFM parameter map.
Does not supply DFM observable prediction rules.
Does not supply frozen DFM predictions.
